data_description.type: Choose 'API' to control devices via the Govee cloud API (requires an API key), or 'BLE' to control devices directly over Bluetooth.

data_description.api_key: Your Govee API key. Obtain it from the Govee Home app under Profile → About Us → Apply for API Key.

data_description.address: The Bluetooth address of the Govee device discovered nearby.
data_description.model: The exact model number of your Govee device (e.g. H617C). Check the label on the device or its packaging.
The exact model number of your Govee device (e.g. H617C). Check the label on the device or its packaging.

abort.no_devices_found: No devices found on the network
